title: 10 best herbal tinctures for urinary calculus
description: Parsley tinctures helps with urinary calculus because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties that soothe the bladder and ureters, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with kidney stones. The herb's diuretic effects also help increase urine flow, which can aid in the passage of smaller stones and prevent further stone formation. Additionally, parsley's antioxidant properties may help protect the kidneys from oxidative stress and damage caused by the presence of stones....
